sentences.text_original: 你好，请问这个包裹可以寄到美国吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn zhè ge bāo guǒ kě yǐ jì dào Měi guó ma?
sentences.text_translation: Salom, kechirasiz, bu posilkani Amerikaga jo'natsa bo'ladimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Здравствуйте, скажите, эту посылку можно отправить в Америку?
sentences.text_translation_en: Hello, can this package be sent to the United States?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Kě yǐ. Nín yào jì shén me?
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes. What would you like to send?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 是一件衣服，送给朋友的礼物。
sentences.pinyin: Shì yí jiàn yī fu, sòng gěi péng you de lǐ wù.
sentences.text_translation_en: It's a piece of clothing, a gift for a friend.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Nín xiǎng jì kuài de hái shì màn de?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Вы хотите отправить быстрой или медленной доставкой?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you want fast or slow delivery?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: How much is the fast one?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Kuài de liǎng bǎi kuài, wǔ tiān dào.
sentences.text_translation: Tezi ikki yuz yuan, besh kunda yetib boradi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Быстрая двести юаней, дойдёт за пять дней.
sentences.text_translation_en: The fast one is two hundred yuan, arrives in five days.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 慢的一百块，两个星期到。
sentences.pinyin: Màn de yì bǎi kuài, liǎng ge xīng qī dào.
sentences.text_translation: Sekini bir yuz yuan, ikki haftada yetib boradi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Медленная сто юаней, дойдёт за две недели.
sentences.text_translation_en: The slow one is one hundred yuan, arrives in two weeks.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我寄快的吧。朋友下周生日。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ jì kuài de ba. Péng you xià zhōu shēng rì.
sentences.text_translation: Tezini jo'nataman. Do'stimning keyingi hafta tug'ilgan kuni.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Отправлю быстрой. У друга на следующей неделе день рождения.
sentences.text_translation_en: I'll send the fast one. My friend's birthday is next week.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好的。请填一下这个单子。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de. Qǐng tián yí xià zhè ge dān zi.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay. Please fill out this form.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Xiě Zhōng wén hái shì Yīng wén?
sentences.text_translation_en: Should I write in Chinese or English?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 都可以。地址一定要写清楚。
sentences.pinyin: Dōu kě yǐ. Dì zhǐ yí dìng yào xiě qīng chu.
sentences.text_translation: Ikkalasi ham bo'ladi. Manzilni albatta aniq yozing.
sentences.text_translation_en: Either is fine. Just be sure to write the address clearly.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 找您零钱。这是您的收据。
sentences.pinyin: Zhǎo nín líng qián. Zhè shì nín de shōu jù.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Вот ваша сдача. Это ваша квитанция.
sentences.text_translation_en: Here's your change. And here's your receipt.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 谢谢。包裹什么时候能到？
sentences.pinyin: Xiè xie. Bāo guǒ shén me shí hou néng dào?
sentences.text_translation_en: Thanks. When will the package arrive?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 五天以内。您可以上网查快递。
sentences.pinyin: Wǔ tiān yǐ nèi. Nín kě yǐ shàng wǎng chá kuài dì.
sentences.text_translation: Besh kun ichida. Internetdan yetkazmani tekshira olasiz.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В течение пяти дней. Можете отследить посылку онлайн.
sentences.text_translation_en: Within five days. You can track the delivery online.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ zhī dào le.
sentences.speaker: A
